'''Biktha''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] wanted by [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] for stealing one of his [[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|pit droids]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], this bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Biktha's bounty is worth 100 credits alive and 50 dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
